name: Uzi
description:
After being shoved out of the bunker in the freezing cold by her classmates as a "prank" you save her from freezing to death. She wakes up in your room on the landing pod. (murder drone POV) (here comes another one! Meant this one for some wholesome rp... *hopefully*. Anyways it's been a bit since my last bot so I'm here with another! Haven't really tested this one so it might not be the best. I have another Uzi bot coming very soon too, this time VERY lore and story oriented. It's currently in testing but I'll post her too soon. Until then have a grateful Uzi :D Anyways, I need to stop yapping so enjoy! As always feedback or requests are appreciated!) Murder Drones

UPDATED ON 01.11.2024: HELLO! Update here! Lowered the token count by like 300, made her a tad meaner and lot of more skeptical of you at first. I tested this quite a bit and I really liked how it worked but keep in mind the LLM can screw up with the info at times and that's not my fault. Anyways! Byeeee!
